blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: The medical examiner's preliminary findings combined with physical evidence support that conclusion. Yes.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: We're not making that determination yet.

blocks.speaker: Dean
blocks.content: But you're not ruling it out.
Cade put his elbows on his knees and covered his face with both hands. He stayed like that for a moment. When he lowered them his eyes were red.

blocks.speaker: Cade
blocks.content: He was fine at breakfast. He was laughing. He made the fish.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: I know. I've heard that from all of you and I believe you.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: That's what we're here to find out. And I have some information I want to share with you this morning that may help us understand what happened Saturday night.
The room found a new quiet. The kind that means we're listening.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: Saturday evening at nine seventeen, Marcus made a phone call. It lasted twenty-six minutes. You all heard it through the ceiling.

blocks.speaker: Davenport
blocks.content: It wasn't work. The number Marcus called is registered to a man named Gideon Price.
And again — five faces. Four of them blank with a name they didn't recognize.
One of them not blank at all.
